message:
feat: add Linear adapter for tracker framework (GH#1150)

Wraps internal/linear client and mapping as a tracker.IssueTracker
plugin. Also removes ephemeral type filtering from engine — callers
use ExcludeTypes instead of hardcoded Gas Town internals.
